Dynamic Notch
High-performance macOS utility that converts the MacBook hardware notch into an interactive software hub for productivity and system control.

Overview
Dynamic Notch is a macOS application (Swift/SwiftUI) designed to utilize the "dead space" of the MacBook notch. It provides a persistent, hover-activated interface for file management, media control, and quick data access.

Core Features
File Tray: A temporary storage buffer for drag-and-drop operations. Acts as a global clipboard for files to facilitate moving assets between apps (e.g., Finder to Slack).

Media Controls: Real-time Now Playing metadata and playback controls (Play/Pause/Skip) for system-level audio.

System Widgets: Glanceable local weather data and system status updates.

AirDrop Integration: Dedicated drop zone to trigger the macOS AirDrop sharing sheet for any file placed in the notch.

Note-Taking: Minimalist text buffer for transient notes and snippets.

Technical Implementation
Platform: macOS 12.0+

Input Methods: Mouse hover, drag-and-drop, and click-to-expand.

Architecture: Lightweight background process with a dynamic overlay UI that adjusts to notch dimensions across different MacBook models (Pro 14", Pro 16", Air).

Notch Nook Dynamic Island
